name: Trello
tagline: Visual project management with boards, lists, and cards
description: Trello is a simple, visual Kanban-style project management tool by Atlassian. Its card-based interface makes it easy for teams of any size to organise tasks. Best for straightforward workflows that don't need heavy configuration.
use_cases: You want to get a small team organised in under an hour without training — drag cards across lists and you're done
You're managing a simple content calendar, product backlog, or personal task list that doesn't need Gantt charts or dependencies
Your team is already using Atlassian tools like Jira or Confluence and wants a lightweight board that integrates natively
You need a free, no-fuss Kanban tool for a side project, freelance workflow, or team with under 10 people
